operating_ranges.evidence: Parameter 3020/4020/4020: Maximum motor speed, Valid data range: 0 to 32767
Parameter 3022/4022/4022: Speed arrival detection level, Standard setting value: 150
Parameter 3023/4023/4023: Speed detection level, Standard setting value: 30
Parameter 3024/4024/4024: Speed zero detection level, Standard setting value: 75
Parameter 3025/4025/4025: Sets a torque limitation value, Standard setting value: 50
Parameter 3026/4026/4026: Load detection level 1, Standard setting value: 83
Parameter 3027/4027/4027: Load detection level 2, Standard setting value: 95
Parameters 3040/4040/4040 and 3041/4041/4041: Velocity loop proportional gain, Standard setting: 10
Parameters 3048/4048/4048 and 3049/4049/4049: Velocity loop integral gain, Standard setting: 10
Parameter 3038/4038/4038: Orientation speed upper limit, Standard setting value: 0

degradation_mechanisms.rate_description: short-time overload detection period standard: 30 seconds
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Parameter 3123/4123/4123: Short-time overload detection period, Standard setting value: 30
Parameter 3089/4089/4089: Velocity error excess detection level when the motor is rotating
SP0027: Position coder disconnected, SP0047: Position coder signal error

fault_conditions.name: motor_overheat
fault_conditions.symptoms: motor temperature exceeds safe operating limits

fault_conditions.name: overspeed
fault_conditions.evidence: SP0007: Overspeed, Parameter 3087/4087/4087: Excessive speed level, Standard setting value: 115

fault_conditions.name: short_time_overload
fault_conditions.symptoms: load ≥90% of maximum output for ≥30 seconds

maintenance_actions.name: parameter_initialization
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: all motor parameters to factory defaults
maintenance_actions.evidence: Parameter 4019#0 PRLOAD: Automatic parameter setting function performs automatic parameter setting

maintenance_actions.name: motor_power_cycle
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: motor power state and control system
maintenance_actions.evidence: Parameter 3081/4081/4081: Delay time until the motor power is turned off, Standard setting value: 20 (200ms)

assumptions.statement: Motor operates within specified speed ranges based on motor model
assumptions.reason: Different motor models have different maximum speeds (6000, 8000, 10000, 12000, 15000 min⁻¹) as shown in parameter tables

assumptions.statement: Standard parameter settings are appropriate for most applications
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'Usually, the settings of these parameters need not be changed. Use the values indicated on a parameter table for each motor model without modification'

assumptions.statement: Gear ratio is typically 1:1 unless otherwise specified
assumptions.reason: Gear ratio parameters 3056-3059/4056-4059 have standard setting of 100, representing 1:1 ratio
